changePwd.errMismatch: Sabbin kalmomin shiga ba su dace ba
changePwd.errSameAsOld: Sabuwar kalmar sirri ta yi daidai da tsohuwar kalmar sirri
changePwd.errWrongCurrent: Kalmar sirri ta yanzu ba daidai ba ce
changePwd.errNoPassword: Canza kalmar sirri ba ya samuwa ga wannan asusun (shigar Google).
changePwd.errSuperAdmin: An saita kalmar sirri ta super-admin a cikin tsarin sabar.

sip.title: Wayar tarho ta SIP
sip.subtitle: Saita akwati don kira mai shigowa da mai fita
sip.passwordChangeLabel: Sabuwar kalmar sirri (bar komai don kada a canza)

incoming.heading: Kiran SIP mai shigowa
incoming.lead: Adireshin SIP na musamman don tura kiran waje daga mai bada sabis ɗinka zuwa tsarin VibeVox.
incoming.emptyTitle: Ba a ƙirƙiri adireshin SIP mai shigowa ba
incoming.emptyHint: Ƙirƙiri wani SIP URI na musamman + shiga/kalmar sirri don abokan ciniki su iya kiranka daga kowace waya, kuma VibeVox zai fassara muryarka ta atomatik a ainihin lokaci.
incoming.create: Ƙirƙiri adireshin SIP don kira mai shigowa
incoming.paused: An ƙirƙiri adireshin SIP, an dakatar da karɓar karɓa
incoming.activeHint: Mai fassara Bridge yana sauraron ɗakin. Kowace kira ana fassara ta a ainihin lokaci.
incoming.pausedHint: Kunna karɓa don sa VibeVox ya fara fassara kira masu shigowa.
incoming.createdToast: An ƙirƙiri adireshin SIP mai shigowa
incoming.deletedToast: An cire adireshin SIP mai shigowa

outbound.heading: Kira mai fita
outbound.lead: Kira lambar waya daga hanyar haɗin yanar gizo kuma VibeVox zai fassara tattaunawar ku ta atomatik a ainihin lokaci.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: Da farko, saita akwati mai fita na SIP
outbound.noTrunkHint: Cika fom ɗin "Sabon Tsarin SIP" a saman shafin - VibeVox zai yi amfani da mai samar da SIP ɗinku (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk) don kiran da ke fita.
outbound.configureFirst: Da farko, saita akwati mai fita na SIP (fom ɗin da ke sama)
outbound.invalidNumber: Da fatan a shigar da lambar da ta dace a tsarin ƙasashen waje (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)

howTo.heading: Yadda ake saitawa
howTo.step1: Sami takardun shaidar SIP daga mai bada sabis ɗin ku (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: Shigar da su a cikin fom ɗin da ke sama kuma adana.
howTo.step3: VibeVox zai ƙirƙiri akwatin SIP mai fita ta atomatik a cikin LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: Nan ba da jimawa ba: URI mai shigowa na SIP don tura kira daga waje.

validation.loginRequired: Da fatan a shigar da sunan mai amfani

tenantOnly.title: An tsara akwatunan SIP a matakin mai haya
tenantOnly.hint1: Ba za a iya saita wayar SIP a ƙarƙashin asusun superadmin ba (ba tare da UUID na mai haya ba).
tenantOnly.hint2: Shiga a matsayin mai amfani na yau da kullun wanda ke da nasa tenantId don ƙirƙirar akwati.

sip.connected: An adana akwatin SIP kuma an daidaita shi tare da LiveKit

sections.providerData: Cikakkun bayanai don mai samar da SIP ɗinku

danger.deleteTrunkHint: Za a goge tsarin. Kiran da ke fita zai tsaya har sai kun sake ƙirƙirar akwatin.
danger.deleteInbound: Cire adireshin SIP don kira mai shigowa
danger.deleteInboundHint: Za a cire dokar shigowa da aikawa ta LiveKit. Ba za a sake karɓar kiran da ke shigowa ba.
danger.reissueHint: Sake fitar da shiga da kalmar sirri don adireshin SIP. Tsohon bayanin ba zai sake aiki ba.

outbound2.rateInfo: Mai bada sabis na SIP ɗinku yana ƙayyade farashin kowace minti na kiran fita.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: Wannan aikin ba zai iya canzawa ba. Da zarar an goge shi, kiran da ake fita zai tsaya har sai an ƙirƙiri sabon akwati.
confirm.deleteInboundBody: Wannan aikin ba zai iya jurewa ba. Za a goge tsarin shigarwa da kuma dokar aikawa a cikin LiveKit Cloud.

page.title: Saitunan Kasuwanci
page.subtitle: Duk haɗin kai, maɓallai, da sigogin AI na asusunka
page.upsellTitle: Wannan sashe yana samuwa a cikin tsarin Kasuwanci.
page.upsellBody: Anan zaka iya saitawa: maɓallin Gemini API na sirri, tushen gaggawa da ilimi, haɗawa da bot ɗin Quest Flow + Telegram, da haɗawa zuwa Chatwoot CRM.

common.savedPlaceholder: An adana (shigar da sabo don maye gurbin)

apiKey.savedPlaceholder: An adana (shigar da sabo don maye gurbin)

gemini.heading: Maɓallin API na Google Gemini
gemini.lead: Maɓalli na sirri daga AI Studio. Wannan ya maye gurbin maɓalli na duniya don duk kiran Gemini akan asusunka.
gemini.leadSuffix: Ana amfani da shi maimakon na duniya don duk kiran Gemini akan asusunka.
gemini.statusQuotaExceeded: An wuce adadin da aka ƙayyade
gemini.errEnterKey: Shigar da maɓallin Gemini API ɗinku
gemini.successSavedValidated: An adana maɓallin kuma an tabbatar da shi - yana aiki.
gemini.successValid: Makullin yana da inganci - Gemini API yana samuwa.
gemini.successDeleted: An cire maɓallin kowane mai haya.
gemini.confirmDeleteTitle: Share maɓallin Gemini na kowane mai haya?
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: Ayyukan AI za su yi amfani da maɓallin da aka raba na VibeVox (idan an saita su).

telegram.heading: Telegram bot don sanarwa
telegram.lead: Ƙirƙiri bot tare da @BotFather kuma saka alamarsa. Duk wanda ya aika saƙon wannan bot da /start zai sami sanarwa: sabbin abokan ciniki, alamomi, kurakuran haɗin kai. Kuna iya yin rijistar ma'aikata da yawa ko ƙara bot zuwa rukuni ko tashar - sanarwar za a aika ta ga kowa ta atomatik.
telegram.leadAllWhoStart: Duk wanda ya rubuta wannan bot ɗin
telegram.leadAfterStart: , zai karɓi sanarwa game da sabbin abokan ciniki, alamun, da kurakuran haɗin gwiwa. Kuna iya yin rijistar ma'aikata da yawa ko ƙara bot zuwa rukuni ko tashar - kowa zai karɓi sanarwar ta atomatik.
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ An adana Bot @{{username}}. An aika gaisuwa ga masu biyan kuɗi na {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ An adana Bot @{{username}}. Duk wanda ya aika saƙon /start zai sami sanarwa.
telegram.successTestSingle: ✓ An isar da sako. Duba Telegram.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ An aika da saƙo ga masu karɓa {{count}}. Da fatan za a duba Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Aika sanarwar gwaji ta hanyar bot
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: Za a kuma cire masu biyan kuɗi - sanarwar za ta daina zuwa.
telegram.lastBroadcast: Saƙon da aka aika kwanan nan: an kawo {{sent}} daga {{total}}

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: Ajiye kuma tabbatar da maɓallin API da farko - samar da hoto yana buƙatar sa.
imageModel.hint: Nano Ayaba tana samarwa, gyarawa da kuma tsarawa. Imagen yana samarwa ne kawai daga farko.

prompt.heading: Nasihu
prompt.subtitle: Sanarwa da kuma tushen ilimi don kwafi a cikin ɗakunan bidiyo kawai
prompt.warning: Kada a rikita shi da Quest Flow
prompt.kbLabel: Tushen ilimi (mahallin kamfani, Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi, da kuma bayanai)
prompt.showDefault: Menene AI ke amfani da shi ta hanyar tsoho?
prompt.appendNote: Za ka iya ƙara dokokinka - za a haɗa su da waɗanda aka riga aka tsara.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: kawai don buɗe saƙonni a cikin ɗakunan bidiyo
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - idan ka danna saƙo a cikin hira ka zaɓi sautin
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Ana amfani da shi lokacin da ka danna saƙo a cikin tattaunawar ɗakin bidiyo kuma ka zaɓi sautin
prompt.contextLeadPart2: Tushen ilimin kuma yana gauraye a cikin (ƙasa).
prompt.defaultSummary: Abin da AI ke amfani da shi ta tsohuwa (idan filinka babu komai) - danna don gani
prompt.extendNoteText: tare da ƙa'idodi/salo/kalmomin kansu - za a haɗa su da tsohuwar tambayar da ke sama da tushen ilimin.
prompt.kbHeading: Tushen Ilimi — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Loda takarda—katalog, Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi, jerin farashi, ƙa'idoji, ko kayan nuni. Ana tantance abubuwan da ke cikin sabar (Word/Excel/CSV → rubutu) kuma AI ta haɗa su lokacin rubuta saƙonni a cikin ɗakunan bidiyo. Iyaka: Fayil 50 MB / haruffa 500,000 a cikin bayanan.
prompt.successFileUploaded: Fayil ɗin "{{filename}}" ({{format}}) an ɗora - an adana harufa {{kbLength}}.
prompt.successFileTruncated: An rage abubuwan da ke ciki zuwa haruffa {{max}}.
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: Duk takardun da aka ɗora za su ɓace. Ba za a iya soke wannan aikin ba.
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: A cikin tattaunawar Ɗakin Kasuwanci, zaku iya haskaka kowane saƙo kuma ku nemi AI ya bayyana shi da sautin da aka zaɓa.
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: yana amfani da umarninka daga filin da ke sama.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Amsoshin AI ga abokan ciniki ta hanyar bots na Telegram da API na Inbound
questFlow.warning: Idan filin babu komai a ciki, ana amfani da umarnin VibeVox na gaba ɗaya.
questFlow.apiKeyLabel: Maɓallin API mai shigowa (Mai ɗaukar kaya)
questFlow.headerLead: Tattaunawar AI tare da kowane abokin ciniki daban-daban ta hanyar Telegram bot da aka haɗa da Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: Kowace maɓalli sirri ce da ka saka a cikin toshewar Quest Flow HTTP na sarkar. VibeVox yana amfani da shi don gano asusunka. Kuna iya ƙirƙirar maɓallai da yawa don sarƙoƙi daban-daban.
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ Ajiye maɓallin - ana nuna shi sau ɗaya kawai
questFlow.noKeysHint: Babu maɓallai tukuna. Ƙirƙiri na farko.
questFlow.neverUsed: ba a yi amfani da shi ba
questFlow.confirmRevokeBody: Quest Flow zai daina aiki a cikinsa.
questFlow.promptLead1: Yana ƙayyade YADDA AI ke sadarwa da abokan ciniki ta hanyar Quest Flow: yanayi, salo, abin da za a gane.
questFlow.promptLeadBold1: Idan filin babu komai a ciki
questFlow.promptLead2: - ana amfani da umarnin VibeVox na gaba ɗaya (a ƙasa).
questFlow.promptLead3: - Za a haɗa shi da ainihin abin da ake buƙata da kuma tushen ilimi.
questFlow.defaultSummary: Abin da AI ke amfani da shi ta tsohuwa (idan filinka babu komai) - danna don gani
questFlow.kbLead1: Takardu - kundin sabis, jerin farashi, Tambayoyin da ake yawan yi. Loda TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — AI ba zai sami bayanan kamfanin ba; zai mayar da martani ne kawai bisa ga ilimin gabaɗaya.
questFlow.kbLead3: Daga sashen "Amsa"—don kwafi bidiyo. Iyaka: Fayil 50 MB / haruffa 500,000 a cikin rumbun adana bayanai.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: Za a share tushen ilimin Quest Flow. Ba za a iya gyara wannan aikin ba.
questFlow.tagsLead: AI yana ba wa abokan ciniki waɗannan alamun idan ya gano daidaito a cikin tattaunawar. Ana nuna alamun akan katin ɗakin abokin ciniki kuma ana aika su zuwa CRM (Sashe na 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: Za a goge maɓallin har abada. Quest Flow zai daina aiki ta hanyarsa - za ku buƙaci ƙirƙirar sabon maɓalli kuma ku maye gurbinsa a cikin tsarin.

chatwoot.heading: Haɗin CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: Aika tarihin kira da alamun ta atomatik zuwa Chatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Canja wurin tarihin tattaunawa da alamun buƙatun abokin ciniki zuwa Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.urlFieldLabel: URL ɗin Chatwoot (wanda aka shirya kai tsaye ko app.chatwoot.com)
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Alamar Samun Wakili (daga Bayanin martaba → Alamar Samun dama)
chatwoot.testSuccess: Haɗin yana aiki - Chatwoot yana amsawa.
chatwoot.successSaved: An adana. Yanzu danna "Gwada Haɗin" don dubawa.
chatwoot.whatSentHeading: Abin da ake watsawa a Chatwoot
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Abokin hulɗa (ta telegram_user_id, tare da custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Tattaunawa da bayanin sirri = cikakken tarihin tattaunawa
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Duk alamun buƙatu da aka sanya a cikin
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Ana aika shi lokacin da ka danna "Aika zuwa CRM" da hannu a cikin tattaunawar ɗaki. Aika ta atomatik bayan gano alamun shine fasali na gaba.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

chat.deleteMessageConfirmText: Ba za a iya soke wannan aikin ba. Za a goge rubutun da kafofin watsa labarai da aka haɗa.
chat.deleteMessageConfirmMediaNote: Za a kuma goge fayil ɗin zahiri daga sabar.
chat.enterpriseOnlyHint: Dakunan hira fasali ne na Kasuwanci. Haɓaka shirin ku a cikin sashin "Farashi".
chat.empty: Babu saƙonni a cikin wannan tattaunawar tukuna.
chat.explainTone: Yi bayani a cikin sautin da aka zaɓa

insights.title: Nazarin tattaunawa
insights.tooShort: Tattaunawar ta yi gajeru sosai don nazari.

lobby.title: Shiga taron bidiyo
lobby.subtitle: Kiran bidiyo tare da fassarar AI a lokaci guda
lobby.languageHint: Za ku ji kuma ku ga ƙananan kalmomi daga mai hulɗa da ku a cikin wannan yaren.
lobby.shareHint: Kwafi ka aika wa mai hulɗa da kai don ya gayyace su zuwa taro.
lobby.audioConsent: , kuma sun yarda da sarrafa sauti don fassara.
lobby.footerTagline: Fassarar da ke amfani da fasahar AI
lobby.nameError: Da fatan a shigar da sunanka
lobby.roomFullMsg: Akwai wanda ya riga ya shiga taron. Tuntuɓi mai ƙirƙirar taron ko kuma ku nemi sabon.
lobby.shareSuccessHint: ✓ An kwafi hanyar haɗin. Aika ta zuwa ga wanda kake hulɗa da shi ta Telegram / WhatsApp / Imel. Kuna iya rufe shafin yanzu - hanyar haɗin koyaushe tana aiki.
lobby.overloadedMsg: Too many translations are running right now. Wait a minute and try again — a slot will free up and you'll get in.

paywall.titleNoSub: Don ƙirƙirar ɗaki, da fatan za a yi rijista don tsari

paywall.topupNote: Za a ƙara mintuna zuwa ma'aunin ku nan da nan bayan an biya kuɗin.
paywall.topupNoSubInfo: ℹ Ba ka da rajista mai aiki. Za a ƙara maka da Plus €19/wata—minti 60 sun haɗa da shirinka, don haka babu ƙarin kuɗi.
paywall.topupFreeLine: ↳ {{count}} minti kyauta tare da jadawalin kuɗin fito
paywall.stripeNote: Ana kare biyan kuɗi ta hanyar Stripe. Ana ba da kuɗin minti ta atomatik bayan an biya.
paywall.previewFailed: Ba za a iya lissafin farashi ba
paywall.checkoutFailed: Ba za a iya buɗe Stripe Checkout ba

postCallInsights.subtitle: Kasuwanci · fahimtar bayan kira
postCallInsights.subtitlesHiddenByHost: Mai shiryawa yana ɓoye ƙananan kalmomi

billingPage.title: Tsare-tsare da biyan kuɗi
billingPage.subtitle: Duk fasalulluka na VibeVox - zaɓi tsari wanda ya dace da saurin aikinka.
billingPage.untilEndOfPeriod: har zuwa ƙarshen lokacin da aka biya
billingPage.cancelAutoRenewQuestion: Soke sabunta biyan kuɗinka ta atomatik?
billingPage.cancelTooltip: Soke sabuntawa ta atomatik. Biyan kuɗin ku zai ci gaba da aiki har zuwa ƙarshen lokacin da ake ciki.
billingPage.canceled: An yiwa rajista alama don sokewa
billingPage.cancelFailed: Ba za a iya soke biyan kuɗi ba
billingPage.resumeAutoRenewQuestion: Ci gaba da sabunta biyan kuɗi ta atomatik?
billingPage.resumeNextChargeNote: Biyan kuɗi na gaba zai faru ne a ƙarshen lokacin da ake ciki.
billingPage.resumed: An dawo da biyan kuɗin shiga
billingPage.resumeFailed: An kasa sabunta biyan kuɗin ku
billingPage.promoHint: Za a yi amfani da rangwamen ta atomatik lokacin da ka yi rajista don tsari ko ka sayi ƙarin mintuna.
billingPage.checkoutNoUrl: Ba a karɓi adireshin URL na Biyan Kuɗi na Stripe ba
billingPage.topupCarriedTooltip: An ɗauki mintuna daga lokacin da ya gabata. Ana fara amfani da su.
billingPage.topupHelp: Ƙarin slider na siyayya. Akwai tare da biyan kuɗi mai aiki.
billingPage.tierPlusSummary: Don tattaunawar sirri da masu zaman kansu
billingPage.tierStandardSummary: Ga ƙungiyoyi da masu tattaunawa masu aiki
billingPage.featureCountWithMinutes: {{count}} mintuna na fassara a kowane wata
billingPage.featureHd: Muryoyin fassara na HD (Aoede, Charon, Kore)
billingPage.featureSip: Tsarin waya na SIP (mai shigowa da mai fita)
billingPage.featureRollover: Ana ɗaukar mintuna kaɗan zuwa wata mai zuwa
billingPage.featureCRM: Katunan abokin ciniki tare da ganewa ta atomatik
billingPage.featureCalendar: Kalanda ta Google - Alƙawuran Abokin Ciniki
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Sannu! Ina sha'awar shirin Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.faqQ1: Me ke faruwa da mintunan da ba a yi amfani da su ba?
billingPage.faqA1: Mintocin da ba a yi amfani da su ba suna ci gaba da aiki har zuwa watan kalanda mai zuwa. Suna ƙarewa a watan uku.
billingPage.faqQ2: Zan iya soke biyan kuɗina a kowane lokaci?
billingPage.faqA2: Eh. Za ka iya sokewa a cikin asusunka na sirri da dannawa ɗaya. Lokacin da aka riga aka biya zai ci gaba har zuwa ƙarshensa.
billingPage.faqA3: Cikakken tarin AI: katunan abokin ciniki tare da gane kansa, izinin Telegram, buƙatun da aka keɓance, Kalanda ta Google, alamar buƙatun wayo, fitar da CRM, haɗawa da questflow.pro, da kuma shafin gudanarwa daban.
billingPage.faqQ4: Wane kamfanin wayar tarho na SIP kuke buƙata?
billingPage.faqA4: Duk wani mai bin RFC: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, da sauransu. VibeVox yana ƙirƙirar akwati mai fita ta atomatik.
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 a minti daya. Daga mintuna 60 zuwa awanni 10. Ana ba da kuɗi nan take bayan an biya.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: tare da rangwame na -{{percent}}% tare da lambar talla {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailNoRefund: Ba a mayar da kuɗi ba.
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: Biyan kuɗin zai ci gaba da aiki har zuwa {{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Ana samun mintunan kuɗin fito har zuwa wannan ranar; ana iya siyan ƙarin mintuna.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: Bayan haka, biyan kuɗin zai rufe ta atomatik.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: An soke sabunta ta atomatik · biyan kuɗi zai rufe {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Mintocin shirin ku suna aiki har zuwa wannan ranar; za ku iya siyan ƙarin. Danna "Ci gaba" idan kun canza shawara.
billingPage.languagesLead: Cikakken jerin harsunan da aka tallafa da fassarar lokaci-lokaci. Gano harshen tushe ta atomatik - kowane mahalarci yana zaɓar harshensa na asali.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: Ba a sami harshen a cikin jerin waɗanda aka tallafa ba.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: Gwada wani nau'in haruffa daban—misali, a Turanci ko kuma a haruffan gida. Idan babu tabbas harshen, sanar da mu, za mu ƙara shi.

register.agreementPrefix: Ta hanyar yin rijista, kun yarda

forgot.title: Maido da kalmar sirri
forgot.subtitle: Shigar da imel ɗinka kuma za mu aiko maka da hanyar haɗin murmurewa.
forgot.successHint: Duba imel ɗinka don {{email}}. Idan ba ka ga imel ɗin ba, duba babban fayil ɗin spam ɗinka.

reset.invalidLink: Haɗin ba shi da inganci ko kuma ya ƙare. Nemi sabon sake saita kalmar sirri.

seo.title: VibeVox - Fassarar AI ta ainihin lokaci don kiran bidiyo da SIP
seo.description: VibeVox dandamali ne na fassarar murya mai amfani da AI a lokaci guda wanda ke tallafawa harsuna sama da 100. Ana samun kiran bidiyo, wayar SIP, tattaunawar abokin ciniki, da kuma nazarin tattaunawa mai amfani da AI.
seo.keywords: Fassarar AI, fassarar lokaci guda, kiran bidiyo tare da fassara, wayar SIP, mai fassara murya

footer.poweredBy: Fassarar da ke amfani da fasahar AI

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: VibeVox mai fassara AI ne a lokaci guda don kiran murya da bidiyo a cikin harsuna 108. Wayar tarho ta WebRTC da SIP, mataimakin murya, da fassarar lokaci-lokaci suna aiki akan kowace na'ura.
pwaInstall.installCta: Ƙara VibeVox zuwa allon farko—kira tare da fassara, SIP, da kuma taimakon AI a cikin taɓawa ɗaya. Yana aiki kamar manhajar asali.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: Je zuwa allon gida - ƙaddamar da shi a cikin famfo ɗaya

partner.title: Shirin haɗin gwiwa
partner.subtitle: Raba hanyar haɗinka kuma ka samu
partner.termsEmpty: Ba a saita sharuɗɗan shirin ba tukuna. Da fatan za a tuntuɓi SuperAdmin.
partner.loadError: An kasa loda bayanan haɗin gwiwa
